query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Nevada Department of Education Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed official Nevada School and District Information mapping plus bounded live probes of all 17 county district-owned websites now preserve the county-to-district routing layer.

samples.evidence_snippet: County School Districts Websites: Carson City School District, Churchill County School District, Clark County School District, Douglas County School District, Elko County School District, Esmeralda County School District, Eureka County School District, Humboldt County School District, Lander County School District, Lincoln County School District, Lyon County School District, Mineral County School District, Nye County School District, Pershing County School District, Storey County School District, Washoe County School District, White Pine County School District.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed first-party NDALC evidence on disk explicitly identifies the organization as Nevada’s federally mandated protection and advocacy system.

samples.sample_name: Nevada Disability Advocacy and Law Center
samples.evidence_snippet: NDALC is the federally mandated protection and advocacy system for Nevada and serves human, legal, and service rights for individuals with disabilities.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Nevada PEP evidence on disk preserves statewide family training and support language, statewide contact routing, and U.S. Department of Education support.

samples.evidence_snippet: Nevada PEP will be a long-term, reliable statewide resource for families by providing information, support, and training programs. Statewide: 1-800-216-5188. Programs and Services offered by Nevada PEP are supported in part by the U.S. Department of Education.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party NDALC evidence on disk explicitly preserves statewide disability legal-rights routing through the Nevada Disability Advocacy and Law Center.

samples.sample_name: Nevada Disability Advocacy and Law Center
samples.evidence_snippet: Nevada Disability Advocacy and Law Center serves human, legal, and service rights for individuals with disabilities and is the federally mandated protection and advocacy system for Nevada.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed Nevada DHS root and contact/location guesses show that the old local-office source path is no longer a county directory.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-23 probes confirmed that `https://dhhs.nv.gov/locations` redirects to the generic Nevada Department of Human Services homepage, while reviewed DHS contact/location guesses such as `/Contact/Office_Locations/` 404 and do not preserve county office rows or county-owned local routing leaves.

samples.evidence_snippet: The legacy local-resource root redirects to the generic Nevada Department of Human Services homepage instead of a county office directory.
The reviewed DHS Contact page is live but only preserves statewide contact/navigation content, not county office rows.
The reviewed Office_Locations guess 404s and no county-grade local resource directory is preserved on disk.
